sections_cited: Section 56 of the Specific Relief Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2703 of 2017 ________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.13260/20217. 2. For hearing of main case. 27.02.2025 Ms. Fouzia RAsheed, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Essentially grievance of the petitioner is to restrain the legal proceedings related to encashment of cheques. Prima facie, the plea for interference in criminal matters runs contrary to the law as enunciated in Section 56 of the Specific Relief Act. Through this petition, the petitioner not only sought to interfere in a criminal process, but has also sought a restraint upon the duties of public functionaries. Petition is found to be prima facie frivolous, misconceived and abuse of process of law, hence dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
